Imports

../ast/llstream, ../ast/ast, ../ast/lexer, ../ast/idents, ../ast/syntaxes, ../ast/lineinfos, options, condsyms, msgs, cmdlinehelper, nimconf, depfiles, commands, ../sem/modulelowering, ../sem/sem, ../sem/passes, ../sem/passaux, ../modules/depends, ../modules/modules, ../modules/modulegraphs, ../backend/extccomp, ../backend/cgen, ../utils/platform, ../utils/nversion, ../utils/pathutils, ../utils/astrepr, ../utils/idioms, ../vm/compilerbridge, ../vm/vmbackend, ../ic/cbackend, ../ic/integrity, ../ic/ic, ../backend/cbackend, ../ast/reports_internal, ../ast/report_enums, optionsprocessor, scripting, ../backend/jsbackend, ../tools/docgen, ../tools/docgen2

Types

UsedBuildParams = object
  cmd*: Command
  project*: string
  output*: string
  linesCompiled*: int
  mem*: int
  isMaxMem*: bool
  sec*: float
  case isCompilation*: bool
  of true:
      backend*: string
      gc*: string
      threads*: bool
      buildMode*: string
      optimize*: string

  of false:
      nil
  Source   Edit

Procs

proc customizeForBackend(graph: ModuleGraph; conf: ConfigRef; backend: TBackend) {....raises: [
    ValueError, OSError, IOError, KeyError, Exception, ERecoverableError,
    EOFError], tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, ReadDirEffect,
                      WriteDirEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, WriteEnvEffect].}
Sets backend specific options. This must be called by all commands. backend is the backend to choose when no backend has been selected so far.   Source   Edit 
func execExternalProgramFailedMsg(cmd: string; exitCode: int): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
  Source   Edit 
proc hashMainCompilationParams(conf: ConfigRef): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
doesn't have to be complete; worst case is a cache hit and recompilation.   Source   Edit 
proc mainCommand(graph: ModuleGraph) {....raises: [ValueError, OSError, IOError,
    KeyError, Exception, ERecoverableError, EOFError,
    ResultErrorRef[system.void], CancelConfigProcessing], tags: [TimeEffect,
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteDirEffect, RootEffect,
    WriteIOEffect, WriteEnvEffect, ExecIOEffect].}
Execute main compiler command   Source   Edit
